sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT PRIMARY KEY, sale_date TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));

INSERT INTO sales VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2020-05-01 15:30:00.000+00:00', 150.50), (2, TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2020-06-15 12:00:00.000+00:00', 200.75), (3, TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2021-07-27 10:15:40.123+00:00', NULL);
CREATE TABLE monthly_sales (month_name VARCHAR(20), total_amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO monthly_sales SELECT {fn MONTHNAME(sale_date)}, SUM(amount) FROM sales WHERE amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY {fn MONTHNAME(sale_date)} HAVING SUM(amount) > 100;

SELECT MAX({fn MONTHNAME(sale_date)}) FROM sales WHERE sale_date >= TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00' AND sale_date <= TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2021-12-31 23:59:59.999+00:00';
SELECT {fn MONTHNAME(timestamp(3) WITH TIME ZONE CAST('2020-09-30 18:45:00.000+02:00' AS TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE))} AS month_name FROM sales WHERE sale_date IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE profits (id INT PRIMARY KEY, profit DECIMAL(10, 2));

SELECT p.id, {fn MONTHNAME(COALESCE(s.sale_date, TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2022-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00'))} AS month_name, (p.profit + COALESCE(s.amount, 0)) AS total FROM profits p LEFT JOIN sales s ON p.id = s.id WHERE p.profit IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (dt TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);

INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2023-01-01 12:00:00.000+00:00'), (TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2023-02-01 12:00:00.000+00:00'), (TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE '2023-03-01 12:00:00.000+00:00');
SELECT {fn MONTHNAME(dt)} AS month_name, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY {fn MONTHNAME(dt)} HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
